meta.name: Nova Chen
meta.title: Nova Chen — Spacecraft Software Engineer
meta.description: Building reliable systems for exploration — from ground control UIs to orbital telemetry pipelines.

hero.headline: Engineering software that orbits the impossible.
hero.subheadline: Full-stack developer focused on resilient systems, immersive interfaces, and tools that help teams ship under pressure.

about.title: About
body: I design and ship software where failure modes matter — telemetry dashboards, mission simulators, and developer platforms used in high-stakes environments.
When I'm not coding, I'm sketching star maps, contributing to open-source observability tools, and mentoring engineers entering aerospace-adjacent tech.

projects.title: Orbital Telemetry Console
projects.summary: Real-time satellite health dashboard with anomaly detection and operator playbooks.
body: Built a mission-control dashboard that ingests telemetry streams from multiple satellite buses and surfaces anomaly scores in under two seconds.
Operators use configurable playbooks to acknowledge, escalate, or auto-remediate common failure modes without leaving the console.

projects.title: Nebula Design System
projects.summary: Accessible component library themed for dark environments and mission-critical UIs.
body: Designed and documented a token-driven component library optimized for low-light control rooms and high-contrast readability.
Shipped Storybook workflows and accessibility checklists adopted by three product teams.

projects.title: Launch Pad CI
projects.summary: Pipeline orchestration templates for multi-stage deploys with rollback guardrails.
body: Created reusable GitHub Actions templates with staged deploy gates, automated smoke tests, and one-click rollback paths.
Reduced failed production deploys by standardizing pre-flight checks across services.

experience.summary: Ground-system UI and incident tooling for mission operations.
highlights: Led UI modernization for the telemetry console used by 40+ operators.
Reduced mean incident response time by 40% via playbooks and alerting.
Introduced design-system patterns adopted across three product teams.

experience.summary: Simulation tooling and APIs for pre-flight validation workflows.
highlights: Built simulation tooling and APIs for pre-flight validation workflows.
Delivered test harnesses that cut pre-launch verification cycles by 25%.

contact.title: Establish contact
contact.message: Open to mission-critical product work, consulting, and speaking on resilient systems.
